indication: Vyloy (zolbetuximab for injection), in combination with fluoropyrimidine- and platinum-containing chemotherapy, is indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma whose tumours are Claudin (CLDN) 18.2 positive as determined by a validated test.
description: Health Canada approved zolbetuximab, in combination with fluoropyrimidine- and platinum-containing chemotherapy, for the first-line treatment of adult patients with locally advanced unresectable or metastatic HER2-negative gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma whose tumours are Claudin (CLDN) 18.2 positive as determined by a validated test.
raw_cancer_type: locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma
